title: Direct CatBoost experts by six-hour NWP lead phase
rationale: The daily NWP issue supplies lead hours +12 through +35, but the current direct learner uses one tree ensemble for all horizons. Four direct experts can learn horizon-specific forecast bias while preserving the successful CatBoost feature and loss surface.
expected_signal: The Q2-selected phase experts must beat both the exact current group-3 H2 surface and the monolithic CatBoost parent, with all seeds positive, all four lead phases positive, at least four positive months, and a non-negative bootstrap lower tail.
risk_notes: Partitioning reduces rows per model and can amplify FICR variance. This run is a full-replacement diagnostic and cannot emit a submission.
